utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: I had a really nice time tonight .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I had a really nice time tonight .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So did I . I am really glad Monica asked us out .

utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: I would love to ask you in , but uh , my sister visiting and I think she is asleep on the couch .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You are sister ? You are sister asleep on the couch ? Ohhh ! I saw her with you on the subway and now she is asleep on the couch !

emotion_cause.span: 4_You are sister asleep on the couch ?

utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: Oh hey , great , you are up . Rachel , this is my sister Krista . Krista , this is Rachel .

utterances.speaker: Krista
utterances.text: Nice to meet you . I wish you would told me we were having company , I would fix myself up !

emotion_cause.span: 7_I wish you would told me we were having company , I would fix myself up !
